name: Cola Oven Barbecue
recipeIngredient: 1 Whole Chicken (3 lbs), cut into pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large non-aluminum saucepan, melt butter over low heat. Add onion and garlic, and cook until onion is soft, about 5 minutes. Add bay leaf, cola, ketchup, Worcestershire sauce, mustard, vinegar, salt, and pepper to taste. Simmer sauce for 1 hour, stirring occasionally.
2. Preheat oven to 350°F. Pour half of the sauce into the bottom of a 13x9x2-inch baking dish. Arrange chicken pieces skin side up in the dish. Spoon the remaining sauce over the chicken. Bake for 30 minutes. Turn the chicken and baste; bake another 30 minutes.
3. Increase oven temperature to broil. Spoon half of the remaining sauce over the chicken. Broil until crisp, about 4 minutes. Turn the chicken over and spoon on the remaining sauce; broil until crisp.
Prep: 10 minutes
Cook: 2 1/4 hours
Serves: 4
